case_title: BAYVIEWIMPORTS et al VS. LONDON GALLERY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,937.00 FILED BY BAYVIEWIMPORTS SHAMASH, ELIAS AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON GALLERY HAKIM, MOSES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAMASH, ELIAS AS TO DEFENDANT HAKIM, MOSES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO MAR-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
